MINI PROJECT PRESENTATION
SlotForge — Scheduling Platform
Academic timetable management is one of the most operationally complex tasks in any institution. Balancing teacher availability, room capacities, subject hours, lab dependencies, and section constraints — while eliminating all clashes — scales exponentially with institution size.

SlotForge uses Google OR-Tools CP-SAT, an industry-standard constraint solver, to generate collision-free, optimal timetables automatically. When a schedule is infeasible, its diagnostic engine isolates exactly which constraints conflict — rather than returning a vague failure.

Beyond generation, SlotForge is a complete timetable management platform: multi-tenancy, RBAC, version control with draft/publish/archive lifecycle, audit logging, and PDF/Excel/CSV export. A React admin panel and Flutter mobile app deliver scheduling access across every platform.

CLIENT — WEB

Python + FastAPI

SOLVER ENGINE
Google OR-Tools CP-SAT
Hard constraints · Soft optimization · Infeasibility diagnostics
DATABASE
PostgreSQL + SQLAlchemy 2.0 + Alembic
Multi-tenant · Row-level isolation by organization_id

ROADMAP
Future Scope
01  Domain-Based Scheduling Presets
SlotForge's constraint engine is fundamentally a general resource-and-time allocation system. The academic timetabling domain is its first implementation — but the same engine can power entirely different domains through configurable presets selected at onboarding.
Academic
Teachers · Subjects · Sections · Rooms · Labs
Staff Roster
Employees · Departments · Shifts · Roles

Academic
Teachers · Subjects · Sections · Rooms · Labs
Staff Roster
Employees · Departments · Shifts · Roles
Event Scheduling
Speakers · Halls · Sessions · Volunteers
Facilities
Equipment · Technicians · Maintenance windows
Transforms SlotForge from a single-purpose timetable generator into a configurable scheduling platform.
02  Git-Style Version Control
SlotForge already stores timetables as immutable versions with draft/published/archived states. This extends into a full version comparison workflow with structured diffs and rollback safety.
DRAFT
PUBLISHED
ARCHIVED
ROLLBACK
Structured Diff
Side-by-side comparison — classes changed, teachers reassigned, rooms swapped
Solver Score
Did the optimization improve or regress between versions?
Change Log

Solver Score
Did the optimization improve or regress between versions?
Change Log
Reason codes per version: 'capacity fix', 'staff unavailable'
Safe Rollback
Restore any archived version as a new draft — original stays unmutated
No other timetabling tool in this category offers structured version control with diff comparison.

SlotForge demonstrates that a well-engineered open-source constraint solver can match the core scheduling capability of tools costing tens of thousands of dollars — while adding version control, explainability, and multi-tenancy that those tools don't have. Scheduling is a solved mathematical problem. The real opportunity is in the surrounding workflow.
